comms_minister_leadership.name: Minister Ministry & Leadership
comms_minister_leadership.description: Leadership of the Ministry of Communications, Innovation and Digital Economy. Includes the Minister's roadmap (3MTT), policy announcements, and strategic vision.

telecom_connectivity.name: Telecom & Connectivity
telecom_connectivity.description: Telecommunications sector. Covers MTN, Glo, Airtel, 9mobile, NCC (Nigerian Communications Commission), 5G rollout, network quality, and dropped calls.

internet_digital_access.name: Internet & Digital Access
internet_digital_access.description: Internet penetration and broadband. Covers broadband plan, right of way for fibre optics, cost of data, and ISP services.

digital_id_platforms.name: Digital ID & National Platforms
digital_id_platforms.description: Identity management. Covers NIMC (National Identity Management Commission), NIN (National Identification Number), NIN-SIM linkage, and national database.

cybersecurity_trust.name: Cybersecurity & Digital Trust
cybersecurity_trust.description: Online safety and security. Covers cyber threats, phishing, awareness campaigns, and building trust in digital platforms.

data_protection_regulation.name: Data Protection & Regulation
data_protection_regulation.description: Privacy laws and enforcement. Covers NDPC (Nigeria Data Protection Commission), GDPR compliance, and data breaches.

digital_economy_innovation.name: Digital Economy & Innovation
digital_economy_innovation.description: Growth of the tech ecosystem. Includes startups, tech hubs, 3MTT (3 Million Technical Talent) program, and digital skills training.

egovernance_services.name: E-Governance & Digital Public Services
egovernance_services.description: Digitization of government services. Includes digital public infrastructure (DPI), e-government portals, and galaxy backbone.

comms_fintech_payments.name: Fintech & Digital Payments
comms_fintech_payments.description: Intersection of tech and finance from a digital economy perspective. Covers payment gateways, tech regulation for fintechs.

cybersecurity_infrastructure_crisis.name: Cybersecurity Infrastructure & Crisis
cybersecurity_infrastructure_crisis.description: Major cyber incidents and infrastructure defense. Covers NITDA's role in crisis response and protection of critical digital assets.

digital_sovereignty.name: Digital Sovereignty & Future Infrastructure
digital_sovereignty.description: Control over national digital assets. Includes data localization, cloud sovereignty, and subsea cables.

ai_future_policy.name: AI & Future Policy
ai_future_policy.description: Artificial Intelligence strategies. Includes National AI Strategy, robotics, and emerging tech regulation.

internet_governance_rights.name: Internet Governance & Digital Rights
internet_governance_rights.description: Rights of internet users. Includes freedom of expression online, internet shutdowns, and social media regulation bills.

comms_misinformation.name: Misinformation & Information Integrity
comms_misinformation.description: Combating fake news. Includes fact-checking initiatives and government response to viral falsehoods.

comms_media_stakeholders.name: Media & Stakeholders
comms_media_stakeholders.description: Relationship with tech media and stakeholders. Includes interactions with ALTON (Association of Licensed Telecom Operators of Nigeria) and ATCON.

comms_public_sentiment.name: Public Sentiment & Policy Perception
comms_public_sentiment.description: General public view of digital policies. Includes reaction to NIN-SIM blocking and data prices.

comms_economic_impact.name: Economic Impact
comms_economic_impact.description: Contribution of ICT to GDP. Includes telecom sector revenue and digital job creation.

comms_regional_local.name: Regional & Local Signals
comms_regional_local.description: Digital access in rural vs urban areas.
